name: Sweet Potatoes and Apples II
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel sweet potatoes and cut them in half, then slice.
2. Cook the sweet potatoes covered until nearly done in very little boiling water.
3. Sprinkle apples with lemon juice if not tart.
4. Grease a baking dish and place alternate layers of sweet potatoes and apples.
5. Sprinkle each layer with 1/4 cup brown sugar, cinnamon, and dot with butter.
6. Pour 1/4 cup apple juice or water over the layers.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
